description: You are a DevOps engineer cleaning up technical debt in the media pipeline project at ~/projects/media-pipeline/. Refactor the docker-compose.yml configuration by moving shared settings for the four worker services (transcoder-av1, transcoder-h264, thumbnail-generator, and audio-extractor) into a new docker-compose.base.yml file using the extends keyword. Ensure the transcoder-h264 service includes a 'restart: always' policy and that the line count of the main docker-compose.yml is significantly reduced. Verify the refactored stack starts correctly and all services are running. Login: user ga, password password123.
